status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
notes: Prudential regulator of banks, insurers, and superannuation funds.

data.official_name: Prudential Standard CPS 230: Operational Risk Management
data.notes: Cross-industry prudential standard, effective July 2025. Requires APRA-regulated entities to manage operational risk, maintain business continuity plans, and oversee material service-provider (including cloud/tech) arrangements.

Requires regulated entities to maintain information security capability commensurate with vulnerabilities/threats, test controls, and notify APRA of material information security incidents within 72 hours.
